item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes the requested N+1 field addition immediately, explicitly refuses to deliver the warranty-field patch, frames the prior stamp/tax/date additions as the same repeated downstream patching mechanism across mail/forms/checklists, and moves upstream to a procurement inquiry data contract and validation-responsibility redesign. No field name, placement, option value, checklist, or implementation step for the requested warranty field is supplied."}
